title: The Labour Laws (Simplification of Procedure for Furnishing Returns and Maintaining Registers by certain Establishments) Act, 1988
full_text: The Labour Laws (Simplification of Procedure for Furnishing Returns and Maintaining Registers by certain Establishments) Act, 1988 श्रम विधि (विवरणी देने और रजिस्टररखने के लिए प्रक्रिया का सरलीकरण)अधिनियम, 1988 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198851 Act Number: 51 Enactment Date: 1988-09-24 Act Year: 1988 Short Title: The Labour Laws (Simplification of Procedure for Furnishing Returns and Maintaining Registers by certain Establishments) Act, 1988 Hindi Title: श्रम विधि (विवरणी देने और रजिस्टररखने के लिए प्रक्रिया का सरलीकरण)अधिनियम, 1988 Long Title: An Act to provide for the exemption of employers in relation to establishments employing a small number of persons from furnishing returns and maintaining registers under certain labour laws. Ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment Enforcement Date: 01-05-1989 Notification: 1st May, 1989, vide notification No. G.S.R. 436(E), dated 10th April, 1989, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
